# True positive samples for secret-scan testing.
# These patterns should trigger detection. Constructed strings (not real secrets).
#
# IMPORTANT: Tokens that GitHub Push Protection would catch are NOT placed here.
# See tests/hooks/test-secret-patterns.sh — those are built at runtime via string concat.

AKIAIOSFODNN7EXAMPLE
password = "supersecretvalue"
api_key = "longenoughdummyvalue123"
